cyber_city_01: A sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night, neon signs in kanji, rain-slicked pavement, volumetric fog, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render.
underwater_palace: An ornate underwater palace made of glowing coral, bioluminescent jellyfish floating around, ethereal blue light, hyper-detailed fantasy art, wide angle.
vintage_portrait: A 1970s film style portrait of a traveler in the desert, warm grain, hazy sun flare, muted earth tones, shot on 35mm lens.
